node.comment: Can't believe it's been ten years, hmu if u see this
node.ratingTags: Amazing lectures --Gives good feedback--Accessible outside class

node.comment: already miss him, he needs to teach more at Colby!

Professor Bilal is the master of artful teaching, his forte being the vast intricately connected field of CS. I salute professor Bilal and envy his understanding of the bits of this seemingly lifeless metal boxes with copper and silicon body parts.
Does not know dynamic method invocation

Bilal was the reason I passed CS 151. He is one of the best tutor/assistant prof. in the department. He's the one in the lab willing to help during the late hours of the night when everything goes wrong with your code. His explanations/directions are crystal clear and easy to follow. If he taught a class, I would definitely sign up to take it
Did not learn any german.  Was very confused.  Spoke German in English.
He also sleeps with guys, but still very helpful.
Professor Ahmad is the best! Although I think he might be sleeping with some of the students, he's always willing to "help" and definitely knows his way around a computer! Super easy, for sure.
